title: The Denial Machine: Insurer Profit Extraction (Level 4 — Original Computation)

A_care_suppression.mechanism: Care suppression from denial-then-approval cycles (UPGRADED: disease-specific)

B_vertical_integration.mechanism: Margin arbitrage from insurer-owned provider payment premium

C_ai_escalation.mechanism: Excess denials from AI adoption in PA decisions

D_mlr_gaming.mechanism: MLR gaming and accounting loophole extraction (NEW)

E_ma_risk_adjustment.mechanism: Medicare Advantage risk adjustment overpayment recovery (NEW)

editor_assessment.upgrade_summary: Added disease-specific care suppression modeling (Component A), MLR gaming extraction (Component D), and MA risk adjustment overpayment (Component E). All new components computed from published data rather than attribution-based estimates.
